home.claudeWaiting: Claude is waiting for your response
home.deleteConfirm: Delete everything? Sessions, tasks, locks — fresh start.

nouveau.title: New task
nouveau.description: Describe what you need. The assistant creates the task and starts working.
nouveau.placeholder: E.g.: List my desk for sale on Marketplace, price €300...
nouveau.exampleSell: List furniture for sale on Marketplace
nouveau.exampleInvoice: Follow up on an unpaid invoice
nouveau.exampleSellFull: List my desk for sale on Facebook Marketplace. Asking price: €300. Describe it as a solid wood desk, good condition, 120x60cm. Use the photos from the folder.
nouveau.exampleInvoiceFull: Follow up on invoice #2025-042 sent to Acme Corp on February 15. Amount: €1,200. Send a polite reminder email with the invoice attached.
nouveau.exampleInsuranceFull: Compare home insurance quotes for a 3-room apartment in Paris, 65m². I want a comparison table with prices, deductibles, and key coverage.
nouveau.exampleDoctorFull: Find a slot with a general practitioner this week, preferably in the morning. Downtown area. Book the appointment if possible.

taskDetail.taskCompleted: This task is completed. Reopen it to start a session.

instruction.placeholder: Send an instruction to this task...

terminal.title: Claude Processes
terminal.outputAtEnd: {{type}} processes display their output at the end of execution.

memory.title: Memory
memory.placeholder: E.g.: Remember that my accountant is Mr. Smith, reachable at +1 555 0123
memory.empty: No memory files. Use the field above to create one.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Your personal admin assistant. It handles your tasks in the background and only notifies you when it needs you.
onboarding.pillarTasksDescription: Describe what needs to be done, the assistant handles it.
onboarding.pillarAutoDescription: Claude works on its own in the background.
onboarding.pillarControlDescription: You stay in charge. Review, modify, or take over anytime.
onboarding.emptyWaitingUser: When the assistant needs your input, tasks will appear here.
onboarding.emptyWaitingTiers: Tasks waiting for a third party (email reply, callback...) will show up here.
onboarding.emptySuggestions: The assistant monitors your emails and messages. New tasks it detects will appear here.
onboarding.emptyTasks: Your active tasks will appear here.
onboarding.navLockedAmeliorations: Appears after a few days of use

toolbox.title: Agent Toolbox
toolbox.marketplaceDescription: Browse the official MCP registry to extend your agent
toolbox.communityWarning: Community servers are not verified by OpenTidy. Review the source code before installing.
toolbox.searchPlaceholder: Search MCP servers... (notion, slack, github, stripe...)
toolbox.agentsDescription: Choose which AI CLI runs your sessions
toolbox.resetDesc: Delete all tasks, sessions, suggestions, gaps, and memory. This cannot be undone.
toolbox.resetConfirm: Are you sure? This will delete ALL data (tasks, sessions, memory). This cannot be undone.

setup.subtitle: Let's get your personal assistant ready.
setup.name: Your name
setup.connectAgentDesc: OpenTidy needs at least one AI agent CLI to run sessions.
setup.agentBackendError: Cannot load agents — is the backend running?
setup.permissionsDesc: Grant permissions so OpenTidy can access your apps.
setup.doneDesc: You can start creating tasks or configure additional services.
setup.modulesDesc: Enable the modules you want. You can always change this later in Settings.
setup.laterInSettings: You can configure more modules later in Settings.
setup.permissionsModeDesc: Choose how OpenTidy handles sensitive actions (sending emails, browser interactions, payments).
setup.presetSupervisedDesc: You validate every action from the web terminal. Maximum control.
setup.presetAutonomousDesc: The agent works freely but asks your approval for critical actions via notification.
setup.presetFullautoDesc: The agent does everything. You review the audit log afterwards.

settings.title: Settings
settings.modulesDescription: Manage your installed modules — MCP servers, skills, and receivers
settings.permissionsDesc: Control how the agent handles sensitive actions for each module.
settings.mcp.default: Gives the agent tools to interact with {{label}}
settings.mcp.gmail: Gives the agent tools to read, search, and send emails
settings.mcp.browser: Gives the agent a web browser to visit sites and interact with pages
settings.mcp.whatsapp: Gives the agent tools to read and send WhatsApp messages
settings.mcp.telegram: Gives the agent tools to send notifications and read updates
settings.mcp.opentidy: Gives the agent tools to manage tasks, suggestions, and schedules
settings.skill.default: Provides instructions on how to use {{label}}
settings.skill.browser: Teaches the agent how to browse with isolated sessions and anti-detection
settings.receiver.gmail: Automatically receives new emails via webhook
settings.receiver.whatsapp: Listens for incoming WhatsApp messages in real time
settings.receiver.apple-mail: Watches for new emails in Apple Mail
settings.receiver.imessage: Watches for incoming SMS and iMessage
settings.bearerTokenNote: Used for remote API access via Cloudflare Tunnel
settings.tunnelDescription: Secure remote access via Cloudflare Tunnel
settings.tunnelSetupHint: Run 'opentidy setup cloudflare' to configure remote access.

helpTooltip.task: A task that the assistant manages for you, from start to finish.
helpTooltip.waitingUser: The assistant is stuck and needs your response to continue.
helpTooltip.suggestion: A task automatically detected in your emails or messages.
helpTooltip.amelioration: Something the assistant identified to serve you better in the future.
